phrases.intent_en: Ask where the church history panels are
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde están los paneles de historia?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, DON-deh eh-STAHN los pah-NEH-les deh ee-STOH-ree-ah?

likely_response.local: En la nave lateral, cerca del altar.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH NAH-beh lah-teh-RAHL THEHR-kah DEHL ahl-TAHR
likely_response.translation_en: In the side nave, near the altar.

responses.english: In the side nave, near the altar.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH NAH-beh lah-teh-RAHL THEHR-kah DEHL ahl-TAHR
responses.local: En la nave lateral, cerca del altar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the guided tour starts
phrases.text_local: ¿Buenos días, dónde comienza la visita guiada?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh koh-MYEN-sah lah bee-SEE-tah gee-AH-dah?

likely_response.local: En la entrada principal, junto al mostrador.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL HOON-toh AHL moh-strah-DOHR
likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, next to the counter.

responses.english: At the main entrance, next to the counter.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL HOON-toh AHL moh-strah-DOHR
responses.local: En la entrada principal, junto al mostrador.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tower tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se compran las entradas para las torres?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh seh KOHM-prahn lahs ehn-TRAH-dahs PAH-rah lahs TOH-rehs?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla, a la izquierda del patio.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah DEHL pah-TEE-oh
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, to the left of the courtyard.

responses.english: At the ticket office, to the left of the courtyard.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah DEHL pah-TEE-oh
responses.local: En la taquilla, a la izquierda del patio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the elevator to the towers is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el ascensor para subir a las torres?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el ah-sen-SOHR PAH-rah soo-BEER ah lahs TOH-rrehs?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del patio, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the courtyard, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the courtyard, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Al fondo del patio, a la derecha.
